---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What use case isn't well-served today? What are you trying to do that the framework doesn't make easy?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? A new CLI command, a configuration option, an extension point, an adapter, a docs section?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short.

## Scope

- Is this a small addition (helper function, config flag) or a larger piece (new module, new pipeline stage)?
- Are you willing to contribute a PR? Reviewing is much faster than implementing from scratch.

## Additional context

Links to related projects, papers, prior art. Examples from your own use case.
